semantic_boundary.lawful_current_claim: This register captures WS10 failure modes that must block progression until off-box ceremony evidence exists.

failure_modes.trigger: Any root material allegedly generated on a connected development host.
failure_modes.effect: Immediate invalidation of WS10 PASS claims.
failure_modes.required_response: Discard material, emit failure receipt, restart on approved off-box system.

failure_modes.trigger: Receipt or narrative claims ceremony execution without witnessable off-box evidence.
failure_modes.effect: Stop progression and mark receipt invalid.
failure_modes.required_response: Revert to PREPARED_NOT_EXECUTED and document the claim narrowing.

failure_modes.trigger: Shard custody or storage cannot be independently enumerated.
failure_modes.effect: Root cannot be accepted for verifier trust.
failure_modes.required_response: Freeze downstream workstreams and rerun ceremony.

failure_modes.trigger: Threshold claim made without recorded signer presence and witness confirmation.
failure_modes.required_response: Invalidate receipt and require fresh off-box execution.

failure_modes.trigger: Any WS11/Sigstore/Rekor claim appears in WS10-prepared artifacts.
failure_modes.required_response: Block advancement and narrow claims back to WS10 preparation only.
